query:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS `reminders`;

CREATE TABLE `reminders` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `studentId` int,
  `lessonId` int,
  `paymentDueId` int,
  `templateId` int,
  `type` enum('aula','cobranca','inadimplencia','manual') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  `message` text NOT NULL,
  `scheduledAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('pendente','enviado','cancelado') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  `autoGenerated` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `sentAt` timestamp NULL,
  `cancelledAt` timestamp NULL,
  `refId` varchar(100),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `reminders_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `reminders_refId_unique` (`refId`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `reminder_templates` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `type` enum('aula','cobranca','inadimplencia','manual') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  `body` text NOT NULL,
  `isDefault` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `reminder_templates_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `payment_dues` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `studentId` int NOT NULL,
  `amount` decimal(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `dueDate` date NOT NULL,
  `paidAt` timestamp NULL,
  `status` enum('pendente','pago','atrasado') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  `month` int NOT NULL,
  `year` int NOT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `payment_dues_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,

  `status` enum('pendente','pago','atrasado') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pendente',
  `month` int NOT NULL,
  `year` int NOT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `payment_dues_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
